Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril hosts culinary students from his alma mater, Johnson & Wales University.
Video.title: Gumbo 101

Video.summary: Emeril takes you on a trip to Spain as he shares his favorite meals.
Video.title: Taste of Spain

Video.summary: Emeril's Restaurant in New Orleans recipes.
Video.title: Emeril's Restaurant Classics

Video.summary: Join Emeril for a Mexican birthday fiesta!
Video.title: Real Mexican

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Scott Maurer compose an entire meal around Louisiana oysters.
Video.title: with Scott Maurer

Video.summary: We've all heard of soft shell crab, but did you know there's also soft shell shrimp? Emeril presents two delicious recipes.
Video.title: A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp

Image.alt: A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp
A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp
A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp

Video.summary: Did you know that Louisiana is the country's biggest producer of blue crabs? Celebrate the blue crab with Emeril's crab and corn fritters, chilled avocado soup with crab relish, and crabmeat stuffed trout with vodka butter sauce.
Video.title: Louisiana Blue Crabs

Video.summary: New York City firefighters turn up the heat in Emeril's kitchen.
Video.title: Turn Up the Heat

Video.summary: Oyster Shooters, Steamed Blue Crabs, Citrus-Crusted Tuna with Beer Sauce
Video.title: Maryland by the Sea

Video.summary: Add Italian flair to your next dinner with Emeril's favorites.
Video.title: Italian Favorites

Video.summary: Emeril is going back to the basics. Whether you're a novice cook or an advanced chef, you'll love these recipes: vegetable soup, and roast chicken served with roasted root vegetables
Video.title: Back to Basics: Cooking School 101

Video.summary: Tomato and Potato Tart, Potato Gnocchi with Gorgonzola Sauce, Andouille Potato Cakes, Crispy Sea Bass with Confit of Yukon Gold Potatoes, Pancetta and Sweet Peas In Chicago
Video.title: Potatoes (In Chicago)

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Gabrielle Deculus celebrate creole culinary culture.
Video.title: with Gabrielle Deculus

Video.summary: Skate Wing with Grenoble Sauce, Monkfish Court Bouillon, Mousse of Pike with Lobster Salad, Cornmeal-Crusted Lemon Fish with Potato Lyonnaise and Crab Meat Ravigote
Video.title: Uncommon Fish

Video.summary: Aloo Palak, Skordalia with Fried Calamari, Steak Frites, Shepherd's Pie
Video.title: World Famous Potatoes

Video.summary: Nola's Boudin with Smothered Onions, Sweet Potato Crouton, Funky Smothered Sweetbreads, Braised Celery Root with Grilled Venison and Celery Root Mashed Potatoes
Video.title: Braising Techniques

Video.summary: Kicked-Up Clambake; Lobster and Sweet Corn Chowder; Clam Cakes with Tartar Sauce
Video.title: A Day at the Beach

Video.summary: Napoleon of Rutabaga Chips with Sauteed Shrimp; Potato Rosti with Duck Confit; Celery Root Bisque with Lobster; Salsify Saute with Crispy Black Bass
Video.title: Spring is in the Air

Video.summary: Smoked Salmon Tartare on Toast Points; Olive-Crusted Rack of Lamb with Summer Stuffed Tomatoes; Grand Marnier Creme Brulee with Chocolate Ginger Shards
Video.title: Ladies' Night

Video.summary: Bratwurst with Smothered Cabbage, Flo's Roasted Potato Salad, Roasted Pork and Tasso Jambalaya, Beer-Battered Fried Okra Stuffed with Crab Meat, Funnel Cakes
Video.title: State Fairs

Video.summary: Emeril shows New Orleans Saints player Juwan Johnson how to prepare a classic Big Easy dinner.
Video.title: with Juwan Johnson, Chanen Johnson

Video.summary: For your next get together, host a dinner the New Orleans way!
Video.title: Crawfish Celebration

Video.summary: Chocolate Ice Cream Cake Roll with Raspberry Coulis; Key Lime Meringue Pie with Candied Lime Peel; Chocolate Sheba with Chocolate Lattice
Video.title: Big Bold Desserts

Video.title: Emeril's Seafood Shack

Video.summary: BBQ Salmon Gravlax with Warm Potato Salad, Coho Salmon en Papillote, Warm Smoked Salmon Salad
Video.title: Salute to Salmon

Video.summary: Pan-Fried Flounder with Dilled Tartar Sauce, Citrus-Crusted Pompano with Grapefruit Butter, Shrimp Creole Smothered Puppy Drum, Biloxi Bacon
Video.title: Go Fish

Video.summary: If you're searching for a satisfying, no-fuss dinner, look no further than Emeril's one-pot wonders.
Video.title: One-Pot Wonders
